title: Wikipedia list of cognitive biases — core bounded batch
scope: A deliberately bounded first batch of 23 widely taught, textbook-canonical cognitive biases drawn from Wikipedia's List of cognitive biases as retrieved 2026-07-24. This is NOT the exhaustive ~210-entry list; it is a discovery seed. Coverage completeness for this record means every declared candidate is adjudicated, not that the cognitive-bias universe is exhausted. Registration records a named identity only and asserts nothing about the reality, replicability, or causal evidence of any effect.
notes: First named-phenomenon slice (P1-E). A discovery seed can only produce candidates; it cannot support an evidence verdict. Additional biases from the full source remain unregistered and are planned as later batches.
